name: file-scripts
title: File Scripts
description: Run scripts on the current Finder selection — ffmpeg compression presets for screen recordings, with live progress
author: jurre_jan

commands.name: run-script
commands.title: Run Script on Selection
commands.description: Detect the Finder selection, pick an applicable script, run it with live progress

preferences.name: ffmpegPath
preferences.title: ffmpeg binary
preferences.description: Absolute path to ffmpeg (Raycast has no user PATH)

preferences.name: hevcEncoder
preferences.title: HEVC encoder
preferences.description: libx265: best size-per-quality on screen content. hevc_videotoolbox: ~10× faster hardware encode, larger files

preferences.name: extraPath
preferences.title: Extra PATH dirs
preferences.description: Colon-separated dirs prepended to PATH for spawned binaries (Raycast has no user PATH)
